---
title: "Jeffrey Fonseca — Resume"
execute:
  freeze: false
format: 
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    anchor-sections: true
---


Resume QR Code

<details><summary>Show QR Code</summary>

{{< qrcode https://moonpiedumplings.github.io/resume/ >}}

</details>


[Download link](./Fonseca_Jeffrey_Resume.pdf)


![](Fonseca_Jeffrey_Resume.pdf){width=100% height=8000}
